intro: Sample deliverables produced by the Construction persona. Bids assemble from rate cards and takeoffs, AIA pay applications draft from job cost and schedule of values, WIP schedules calculate percentage-of-completion from live cost data, and COI compliance tracks insurance status across every active subcontractor. Click any file below to open the real spreadsheet or PDF. These are 1404-branded test outputs; in a real engagement they carry your brand.

deliverables.name: Bid proposal
deliverables.description: Nine-page branded bid package with scope of work, line-item pricing from rate card, exclusions, qualifications, and submittal. Drafted from takeoff data and project specs.

deliverables.name: AIA pay application
deliverables.description: G702 and G703 pay application sheets with continuation, retention calculation, change order tracking, and schedule of values reconciliation. Generated from job cost data.

deliverables.name: WIP schedule
deliverables.description: Three-tab Excel: WIP Schedule, Prior Period, Change Log. Percentage-of-completion revenue recognition, billings in excess, costs in excess, and gross profit by job.

deliverables.name: COI compliance dashboard
deliverables.description: Three-tab Excel: Dashboard, All Subcontractors, Expiring Soon. Tracks coverage limits, expiry dates, additional insured status, and waiver of subrogation across every sub.
